2606.08167.title: Explaining Data Mixing Scaling Laws
2606.08167.paper_summary: Recent research has established empirical scaling laws to predict model performance on multi-domain data mixtures. However, a theoretical understanding of these model loss behaviors remains absent. In this work, we propose a unified framework to explain the underlying mechanics of data mixing. Our approach extends theoretical perspectives originally developed for standard neural scaling laws (e.g., Kaplan and Chinchilla) to the multi-domain setting. Based on the distributional assumption that domains overlap on fundamental skills while diverging on specialized skills, we identify two key factors that govern the domain losses of models trained on different data mixtures: \textit{Capacity Competition}, where the allocation of finite model capacity couples domain losses globally, and \textit{Noise Reduction}, where optimal weights shift toward harder-to-learn domains to minimize overall noise. Empirical evaluations show that our framework outperforms existing baselines by fitting the loss landscape with a lower Mean Relative Error and identifying higher-performing training mixtures. Most importantly, our model successfully extrapolates across scales, predicting highly effective mixtures for large, unseen scales using parameters fitted on smaller ones. In addition, our model achieves these results using significantly fewer parameters compared to previous empirical laws. Our code is available at https://github.com/meiqwq/Explaining-Data-Mixing-Scaling-Laws.
2606.08167.paper_summary_zh: 最近的研究已建立了經驗尺度法則，以預測模型在多領域數據混合上的性能。<lb/>然而，對於這些模型損失行為的理論理解仍然缺乏。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們提出了一個統一框架，以解釋數據混合的基本機制。<lb/>我們的方法擴展了最初為標準神經尺度法則（例如，Kaplan 和 Chinchilla）開發的理論視角，應用於多領域環境。<lb/>基於域在基本技能上重疊而在專門技能上分歧的分佈假設，我們確定了兩個關鍵因素，這些因素支配了在不同數據混合上訓練的模型的領域損失：<lb/>\textit{容量競爭}，在這裡有限模型容量的分配全球性地耦合了領域損失，以及\textit{噪聲減少}，在這裡最佳權重向較難學習的領域移動，以最小化整體噪聲。<lb/>實證評估顯示，我們的框架通過以較低的平均相對誤差擬合損失景觀並識別更高性能的訓練混合，超越了現有基準。<lb/>最重要的是，我們的模型成功地在不同尺度之間外推，使用在較小尺度上擬合的參數來預測對於大型、未見過的尺度的高效混合。<lb/>此外，我們的模型相比於之前的經驗法則，使用了顯著更少的參數來實現這些結果。<lb/>我們的代碼可在 https://github.com/meiqwq/Explaining-Data-Mixing-Scaling-Laws 獲得。
2606.08167.author: Rui Dai et.al.
